description_long: This is a standard orange basketball with a smooth, slightly matte surface and prominent black channel lines dividing the ball into distinct panels. The ball is spherical and appears to be made of rubber or synthetic leather, with a subtle texture for grip. The black lines form a traditional basketball pattern, with two main horizontal bands and two curved vertical bands intersecting at the poles. There are no visible logos, brand markings, or signs of wear on the surface. The ball's size and proportions are consistent with those used in recreational and professional basketball games. No inflation valve is visible in any of the views.
description: A classic orange basketball with black channel lines and a smooth, grippy surface. No visible logos or wear.
description_view_0: The basketball is shown with two horizontal black lines and a smooth orange surface, with no visible logos or valve.
description_view_1: This view highlights the intersecting black lines forming a traditional basketball panel pattern, with a slight highlight at the top.
description_view_2: Similar to view 0, this side shows the horizontal black lines and the orange surface, with no additional markings.
description_view_3: This view mirrors view 1, showing the intersecting black lines and the ball's smooth, matte finish.
attribute_panel_pattern: Eight-panel design with two horizontal and two curved vertical black channels forming traditional basketball seams.
